title: Universities
description: Find the campuses of these famous American universities.

rounds.clue: The oldest university in the US, founded in 1636, this Ivy League school sits across the river from Boston.
Home to the Trojans, this private research university sits in the heart of Los Angeles.
rounds.answer: University of Southern California, Los Angeles, CA

rounds.clue: The flagship state university of Texas, home to the Longhorns, located in the state capital.
rounds.answer: University of Texas at Austin, TX

rounds.clue: Located in Ann Arbor, this Big Ten school has the largest football stadium in the US — the Big House.
rounds.answer: University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, MI

rounds.clue: Nestled in the Rocky Mountains of Colorado, this school is nicknamed CU Boulder and is known for its research programs.
